message:
fix(tmux): handle deleted working directory on respawn

Add RespawnPaneWithWorkDir to tmux package for respawning panes when
the current working directory has been deleted (e.g., after polecat
nuke removes the worktree). Handoff now checks if the pane's cwd
exists and falls back to town root if it's been deleted.

Based on PR #965 by dwsmith1983.

Co-Authored-By: dwsmith1983 <dwsmith1983@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
